contentBlocks.original:
मनोजवं मारुततुल्यवेगं
जितेन्द्रियं बुद्धिमतां वरिष्ठम्
वातात्मजं वानर यूथ मुख्यं
श्री रामदूतं शिरसा नमामि
contentBlocks.transliteration:
manojavaṃ mārutatulyavegaṃ
jitendriyaṃ buddhimatāṃ variṣṭham
vātātmajaṃ vānara yūtha mukhyaṃ
śrī rāmadūtaṃ śirasā namāmi
contentBlocks.translation: I bow down with my head to Hanuman, the messenger of Sri Rama, who is swift as the mind, as powerful as the wind, the conqueror of the senses, the foremost among the wise, the son of the Wind God, and the leader of the Vānarās (monkey army).
contentBlocks.meanings: मनोजवं (manojavaṃ) – swift as the mind (manas:mind | java:speed); मारुततुल्यवेगं (mārutatulyavegaṃ) – as powerful as the wind (māruta:wind | tulya:equal | vega:speed); जितेन्द्रियं (jitendriyaṃ) – conqueror of the senses (jita:conquered | indriya:senses); बुद्धिमतां (buddhimatāṃ) – among the wise (buddhi:wisdom | mat:possessing); वरिष्ठम् (variṣṭham) – foremost; वातात्मजं (vātātmajaṃ) – son of the Wind God (vāta:wind | ātmaja:son); वानर (vānara) – monkey; यूथ (yūtha) – army; मुख्यं (mukhyaṃ) – leader; श्री (śrī) – auspicious; रामदूतं (rāmadūtaṃ) – messenger of Rama (rāma:Rama | dūta:messenger); शिरसा (śirasā) – with my head; नमामि (namāmi) – I bow down;
